The '''FLR Logger''', also known as the '''FLR-series Logger Droid''' and the '''Lumberdroid''', was an [[environmental droid]] designed by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] for the [[Greel Wood Logging Corporation]]. [[Greel tree]]s' crimson timber was highly sought after in the upmarket world of the vain and wealthy. However, [[Pii III]] and [[Pii IV]] were the only two planets in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] able to support greel trees. Pii IV's rolling terrain was perfect for the lumber droids. However, its popularity quickly spread, and it was soon used to cut all kinds of trees across the galaxy.<ref name="EGD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:FLRLoggerDroid2-FF44.png|thumb|left|An FLR Logger droid]]
Industrial Automaton's original design for the FLR Logger was not liked by various officials from various tree-cutting companies. Industrial Automaton wanted to please everyone, so they made a new design, which pleased no one. But it got the job done.<ref name="EGD" />

The Lumber droid was slow, constantly breaking down, and extremely difficult to repair. Nevertheless, it was still used by various [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. The machine had two arms, a huge build, and two retractable [[Photoreceptor/Legends|visual receptors]]. It stood two meters tall. Both arms had saws under them: one was used to cut through undergrowth, the other to cut trees. If the droid was damaged, an emergency siren would alert [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] in the area.<ref name="EGD" />

The droid sported a [[probability projection computer]] which allowed it to electronically compute how, when, and where a tree would fall.<ref name="EGD" />
